Name: Radiant Shard
Description:
Currency that can be used to purchase precious cosmetics.
A materialized form retained after multiple re-creations of splendid treasures which can be used to exchange for desired cosmetics...

Name: Star Token
Description:
A shiny star-shaped insignia that marks its bearer as worthy of respect in Miliastra Wonderland.
Grants Event Ode discounts.

A shiny star-shaped insignia that marks its bearer as worthy of respect in Miliastra Wonderland.

Name: Fairy Tale Theater: The Witch's Ballad
Description: Once known for staging The Witch's Ballad, the theater now turns its spotlight on a new generation of guests.

Name: Skydome Paradise: Serene Sojourn
Description: A paradise built on floating islands, where visitors' smiles shine as brightly as the clear skies and white clouds above.

Name: Candlelit Nightwalk: Serene Soiree
Description: A venue inspired by Candlelight Revelry Night, perfect for unwinding with friends during lively celebrations.

Name: Tranquil Snowcourt: White Winter Day
Description: A quiet courtyard draped in silver and white. A perfect spot to admire the beauty of a crisp winter landscape with friends.

Name: Festive Market: Chimes Ring in the New Year
Description: A festive-themed street market celebrating the turn of the year. Buzzing with warm holiday atmosphere, perfect for gathering with family and friends.

Name: Skyward Citadel: Magnificent Pillars
Description: A towering city built from massive stones and columns. Layers of clouds proudly drape themselves around it, as if it were their most exquisite jewel.

Name: Beacon Front: Blazing Realm
Description: The ruins of a castle that has witnessed the glory of countless heroes. Now stand as the ultimate proving ground for courage and strength.

Name: Where the Butterflies Prance: Velvet Hallway
Description: Inside the bright, elegant, and ever-warm conservatory, soft, silk-like purple flowers are in perpetual bloom. Floral paths unfold into winding corridors, trailing all the way into the dim, mysterious, and fragrant depths....

Name: Secluded Isle: Azure Ripples
Description: The sunlight here is not meant to shine on something, but to be basked in. The waves here are not merely blue, but form a sea of liquid gemstone.

Name: General Teleport
Description: Arrive and depart with grace...

Name: Flickering Candlelight
Description: As the ethereal flames dance across the various Wonderlands...

Name: Drifting Snowveil
Description: Moves as if carried by the wind, leaving crystal snowflakes behind...

Name: Riches Come and Go
Description: Whether arriving or leaving, there will be coins falling down.

Name: Leaflight Flash
Description: Drift back and forth through shimmering leaves, carried by a gentle breeze.

Name: Scaleflame Ascent
Description: Coming and going like a blazing dragon.

Name: Swirling Butterfly Trails
Description: Like a visible fragrance...

Name: Shimmering Waves
Description: Drifting along with the sea breeze and foam.

Name: Try-On Cape: Phantom Night
Description:
A cape with the magical ability to replicate appearances. Once used, it automatically transforms into the designated outfit, accurately reproducing even the accessories and makeup. When stored, it folds into a card-like form, making it easy to place and identify the corresponding cosmetic.
When used properly, it's a convenient item for trying on cosmetics.
Can be used within 14 days after obtaining. Once used, the try-on effect lasts for 1 day. This item will expire at the end of the current Miliastra Pass.
The Try-On Cape can only be tried on as a full set and cannot be separated into individual parts.

A cape with the magical ability to replicate appearances. Once used, it automatically transforms into the designated outfit, accurately reproducing even the accessories and makeup. When stored, it folds into a card-like form, making it easy to place and identify the corresponding cosmetic.
When used properly, it's a convenient item for trying on cosmetics.
Can be used within 14 days after obtaining. Once used, the try-on effect lasts for 1 day. This item will expire at the end of the current Miliastra Pass.
The Try-On Cape can only be tried on as a full set and cannot be separated into individual parts.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Phantom Night"
Description:
The Phantom Night set is an outfit designed for a special festive evening. When darkness falls and soft moonlight envelops the land, heed the ancient, mysterious call and become the master of this mystical celebration.

This special outfit comes from the 777th world that Octavia visited, a land of quietude and mystery upon which all civilization was built upon a foundation of standardized spellwork, where nothing can truly escape the grasp of "magic."
A young mage who dons the Phantom Night set will light the most critical lantern to be lit on a festival night, and then read a formal (but not dull) opening speech to raise the curtain on the festivities.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Phantom Night"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Offbeat District"
Description:
The Offbeat District set. The bustling streets pulse with vibrant beats as street artists prepare to release their most daring melodies. Let your unique charm shine and watch the entire district go wild for you.

After seven days of travel, Octavia wrote the following comment for the 118th world she discovered by chance: "The Forest of Steel." This was no exaggeration — cities sprawl across this world's continents, weaving a seamless "civilized existence" using steel, concrete, and strict regulations. Yet this order has also given rise to artistic groups who stand against the rules, the rising stars of which use this "Offbeat District" to showcase their striving for freedom...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Offbeat District"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Astral Beacon"
Description:
The Astral Beacon set. With its deep tones and functional design, it adapts seamlessly to any environment, keeping the wearer stylish even amidst nature's furies. Let it become your most reliable companion as you write the chapters of your adventure together.

Though they possessed the ability to modify their entire planet and merge it into a giant academic collective, the civilization to which the 93rd world — the Academy Planet — belonged still put strong focus on basic geology and mapping. During Octavia's visit to the most prestigious geological institution here, two student representatives introduced all the landmarks in great detail while dressed in this "field uniform"...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Sonic Ruins"
Description:
The Sonic Ruins set. A clever fusion of delicate details and raw, hardcore elements, like starlight embers rising from the ruins. Play those soul-piercing notes and let them electrify that dark underground venue.

The 777th world that Octavia chronicled once fell briefly into chaos due to calamitous meteorite showers. Once the crisis had been properly handled and the relevant organizations had completed a set of perfect precautionary measures, they then had "opera mages," who used magic to create light effects, sounds, and visual tricks, to take the stage, perform, and soothe the people. The alternative opera group, Sonic Ruins, was a luminary leader amongst these mages...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Sonic Ruins"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Painted Skies"
Description:
The Painted Skies set. The aspirations of youth are as boundless as the sky. Wearing this outfit evokes cherished memories and dreams, like those earnestly written in the pages of a diary.

After landing quietly on the 93rd world (the Academy Planet), Octavia would embark on a relaxing journey in the guise of a "book supplier," only for a young man and woman to see through her. As it turned out, they had long yearned for both the skies and adventure, and while traveling through the clouds in a hot air balloon, they witnessed Octavia as she landed.
They longed for a life like hers, and thus agreed to keep her secret. Octavia, for her part, saw a certain romanticism in their attitude, along with similarities to people she once knew. Thus, she promised to take them on an interstellar graduation trip once they had completed their key studies...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dawn's Visionary"
Description:
The Dawn's Visionary set. Some seekers of knowledge conquer mountains of tomes, while others journey through uncharted lands guided by the stars. This outfit is a silent tribute to your unwavering spirit of exploration.

Of all the worlds Octavia visited, the 93rd was the most peaceful. This was a pure Academy Planet with an impeccable scholastic atmosphere and living conditions, capable of constantly producing talent with wisdom, skill, and good conduct in equal measure for the civilizations under it. This Dawn's Visionary set is, in turn, based on the most luxurious of graduation gowns. It reminds Octavia when the time she attended three graduation ceremonies in one day back in her younger years, along with the classmates whose faces grew less distinct in her mind over time...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Scarlet Shade"
Description:
The Scarlet Shade set, red as blood and dark as night. Put it on and transform into the wisp of smoke that brushes past the flowers in the moonlight — silent, unseen, and unmistakably deadly.

Octavia discovered a Paradise Planet quite by accident while going to her 712th world. Every city in this world was a holiday haven with a unique theme. Once employed as a consultant, she would tell the people tales of distant Teyvat, and the people of the Paradise Planet would make special modifications to their pre-existing ninja city based on the Inazuman stories she told...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Fervent Fighter"
Description:
The Fervent Fighter set. Designed for agility and protection, this attire allows the fighter to move freely while safeguarding vital areas. The clash of orange and blue embodies the fearless resolve of the fighter, marking each strike as a decisive blow against one's opponent!

Octavia encountered fierce fighting tournaments taking place within the steel forests of the 118th world. The trophy the contestants fought for would add an important feather to their city's cap. This Fervent Fighter set was precisely what the young boxing team, hailed as world-shaking talents, wore when taking this classic photo to celebrate three consecutive championship victories...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Fervent Fighter"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Rose's Lament"
Description:
The Rose's Lament set. The ballad of black thorns and red roses, the whispers of wizards and witches... These are all essential companions in the pursuit of the world's mysteries.

In this world, the 777th chronicled by Octavia, the magic that all things rely upon cannot seem to leave the atmosphere, thus binding the wizards, witches, and their wondrous creations to gravity's well. Yet the threat from deep space continued to grow, and so the young scholars wearing the Rose's Lament set undertook a bold experiment: imbuing magic into meteorite dust and doing all they could to send it back into orbit...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Rose's Lament"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Fairyland Prom"
Description:
The Fairyland Ball set. The grand ball in the heart of the fairy tale world is about to begin. Answer Mr. Rabbit's invitation, gather your companions, and revel in the magic of fairyland!
Octavia served as a consultant on the 712th world she visited for 10 years. By the time she parted ways with them, the fairytales she told the children had already become popular, with many novels, picture books, and film adaptations, as well as a theme park of just the right scale. Octavia was also invited to the opening ceremony, there to personally choose the most suitable outfits for the young men and women playing the leading roles...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Chromatic Artisan"
Description:
The Chromatic Artisan set. Only through bold experimentation with countless pigments can one uncover the ultimate color combinations. The paint splatters on these garments stand as a testament to those moments of pure creativity.
During her employment as an aesthetic consultant on the 712th world, the Paradise Planet, Octavia imposed strict visual standards on the theme park, the most important of which was the influence of color on emotion. At that time, two brilliant artists stood up to present Octavia with a multitude of fantastical plans...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Steamwave Chronicles"
Description:
The Steamwave Chronicles set. As the boilers burned, steam powered the wheels and drove the machinery. In this era, engineers were also the most distinguished ladies and gentlemen at fashionable gatherings.
While serving as an aesthetic consultant on the 712th world, the Paradise Planet, Octavia was presented with a difficult question by the innovative governor — what should the main visual style of a theme park that wanted to appear solemn, elegant, mysterious, and opulent all at once be? Octavia's answer contained many elements derived from Fontaine in Teyvat and from local historical "technical aesthetics," which proved incredibly popular. The main characters of this "Steamwave Chronicles" theme park were a young man and woman dressed as engineers.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Orange Passion"
Description:
The Orange Passion set. Vibrant style and youthful passion merge like orange flames, as the rhythm of exercise syncs seamlessly with the beat of music — unstoppable, like a ferocious tiger.

Within a broader system of “civilized life” that placed immense value on work, the people of the 118th planet often suffered from health issues linked to sedentary lifestyles and excessive overtime. Octavia was not here long before she had received over 100 recruitment messages from professional headhunters, alongside double the number of health supplement ads. Perhaps many of these troubles might have been avoided, had people been able to take some time off every day to rekindle youthful passion, or put some earbuds on and engage in some exercise.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Mystic Forest"
Description:
The Mystic Forest set. As the forest people dance in the morning fog, guided by principles of tolerance and peace, they lead the seekers to gradually uncover age-old secrets...
While touring the 712th world, the Paradise Planet, Octavia encountered a phenomenon known as the "devaluation of happiness": that is, constant exposure to pleasure and entertainment gradually raises one's threshold for happiness. As such, a suitable amount of tranquility is necessary for both guests and the planet itself. Therefore, Octavia designed a serene "forest" with the rainforests of Sumeru in Teyvat in mind —  a place where people can slowly relax through a leisurely journey of exploration.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Maverick Meowster: Magenta"
Description:
The Maverick Meowster set. Shatter your limits in the virtual world, crank up your Maverick spirit to 11, and reclaim precious resources for the weak and vulnerable! And your reward for such noble deeds? Sweet, sweet Magenta Pop and Glacial Gummies!

During her temporary stay on the 118th world, Octavia again used some ingenious techniques to request the delivery of all manner of goods, such as using the virtual world's "carrier pigeons" to send messages to businesses while lying on the sofa in the hotel without leaving the house. However, she also lost her virtual messenger pigeon ID card, which resulted in her travel expenses being stolen. At that moment, it was two heroes in magenta and icy blue who stepped forth and retrieved her stolen treasure from her, thus allowing her to continue her peaceful journey. Otherwise, she might have been caught up in a thriller involving "a witch's pursuit of techno-bandits," landing her in hot water she was much more used to avoiding.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Candlelit Revelry"
Description:
The Candlelit Revelry set. Moonlight descends, candles flicker, and the night of revelry begins. Are you ready? The time for unabating fun and trickery is here!

The first friends Octavia made on the 777th world were two highly gifted and hospitable high-level professors of magic. During classes, they proved skilled at extracting the essentials from obscure esoterica. And in their daily lives — and especially at the festival known to later generations as the Candlelit Revelry — they would be like carefree young men and women, joining the students in fun but moderate pranks, even leading them in begging for candies from other teachers. Amongst them was a lowerclassman of theirs who wore the Rose's Lament set...
Before Octavia left, the two designed a gown for their guest, one that they filled with sincere blessings...

Description: The Fluffy Snowball Set. Cold on the outside yet warm at heart, the Fluffy Snowball is children's best playmate in the heavily snowing winter days. Put on your scarf, brave the cold wind, and enjoy these carefree moments in the warm embrace of the snowball!

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Prelude to Spring"
Description:
The Prelude to Spring Set. The festival bells have begun to ring softly, heralding the approach of a brand-new year. Slip into this outfit and let its warmth stay with you, may good fortune accompany you wherever you go.
 
The 67th planet visited by "Octavia" was the origin of a prosperous civilization. Like many civilizations across the universe, they had a clear concept of "seasons." Though expressed in different languages, the season when crops begin to sprout and grow was always given imagery similar to "spring." The people here likewise held lively celebrations before the arrival of spring to express their good wishes for the future. Early on the festival day, people would immerse themselves in the festive atmosphere and dress up nicely. Of course, ordinary residents wouldn't wear overly extravagant attire, a balance between festivity and everyday wear was the most appropriate choice.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "White Flash"
Description:
The White Flash Set. Unafraid of terrain or weather, stride boldly through the frozen winds and carve the perfect arc atop the towering peaks. This is the newest trend sweeping the world of ice and snow!

Among the many worlds Octavia has visited, the 273rd, known as the "Snow Star," is among the most remarkable. Situated on the edge of its stellar system with insufficient sunlight, its land remains frozen in ice and snow all year round, yet people's passion for life never cools! The most popular sport here is extreme skiing. In top-tier competitions, athletes sprint down from mountain peaks that pierce through the clouds with slopes almost vertical, diving at speeds faster than birds can follow, leaving only trails of pure white... To safely experience the joy of this sport, proper protection is essential. Octavia purchased this ski suit, youthful in style yet exceptional in performance, and attempted a dive that broke the local sound barrier.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Healing Heart"
Description:
The Healing Heart Set. The vivid red markings along the sides are symbols of a healer's calling. As precise in duty as the scale of a syringe, sworn to protect every life's health with a curative heart.

For some highly advanced civilizations, medical care has become an extremely important industry. After Octavia was accidentally struck by a high-speed comet, she followed the recommendations of the residents of the 712th "Elysium Star," she made several transfers before arriving at the 722nd planet, the "Sanctuary of Recovery." Here, the civilization's finest doctors and nurses can treat various common, and even peculiarly shaped and fundamentally different forms of life. Octavia experienced what she calls "retirement life" here for a while, her wounds soon healed, and she was cared for with kindness and patience by two young medical practitioners who left a deep impression on her. Before departing, they even took a commemorative photo together...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Wildpeak Echoes"
Description:
The Wildpeak Echoes Set. Cast aside all worries and awaken the wild within. Answer the call of the untamed land. Let battle marks blend with your skin, let the mighty horns guide your way, and surge through primordial power!

After witnessing many prosperous civilizations, Octavia unexpectedly arrived at a planet in its "Primitive Age." Though the people here had not yet developed an advanced civilization, they possessed customs of communicating with the wilderness and hearts filled with the spirit to challenge fierce beasts and disasters. Some natives saw Octavia as a dangerous outsider, greeting her with spears and flying stones, though she admired their courage. Another group politely invited her to feast, asking her about the mysteries of the stars in clumsy but sincere language. Having no interest in playing the role of a god, Octavia simply documented their distinctive attire, shared them with a few fairy tales, and left their natural evolution untouched...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Winter's Warmth"
Description:
The Winter's Warmth Set. When it comes to winter festivals, there's no celebration without a crackling hearth, a hearty feast, beautifully wrapped gifts, and most importantly, joyful songs shared in reunion!

The 67th world recorded by Octavia was no different. On that winter day, she arrived at a small, unfamiliar town and hesitantly asked for a place to stay, and a kind family welcomed her with warm hospitality. The humble couple served her a generous meal, while their lively children performed melodious songs for her. Octavia committed their faces and attire to memory. Before leaving, she gifted them the sweetest red fruit she had found on this planet as a token of gratitude...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Radiant Melody"
Description:
The Radiant Melody Set. Brilliant like a gem, it draws every gaze with its brilliance. Let the beautiful melody guide you into a captivating dance, where every step holds the audience spellbound.

Before leaving the "civilized world" of the 118th "Iron Forest," Octavia, on a whim, visited a popular music performance venue. There, she mingled with the enthusiastic audience and enjoyed a vivid array of performances. A young but passionate duo left a deep impression on her. It was said that once they made their name in the two-thousand-seat venue, they would step onto even grander stages, aiming to hold concerts in arenas with tens of thousands of spectators. Years later, when Octavia came across the costume records, she couldn't help but wonder if they had reached their goal.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Autumn Veins"
Description:
The Autumn Veins Set. An autumn attire adorned with maple leaves, offering both comfortable wearing experience and exuding a serene, elegant temperament, letting you fully enjoy the beauty of harvest in the golden autumn.
 
On the 67th planet visited by Octavia, advanced technology has brought evergreen crops throughout the year, greatly diminishing the effects of withering and decay on agriculture. However, naturalism hasn't completely yielded to technology. Unmodified ordinary plants that grow, mature, and fade with the seasons are still widely preserved as a vital part of the world's original landscape. The autumn season of maturity and harvest, like many similar worlds, is celebrated and cherished. Gold and orange as primary colors symbolize fruits, often giving a sense of harvest, while azure represents vitality. Attire that weave these colors together in harmony has also earned Octavia's admiration.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Frosty Plume"
Description:
The Frosty Plume Set. Draped in wings of pure white, crowned by the ceaseless cry of the winter wind, this attire embodies serenity and nobility alike. Dance freely in this grand celebration of ice and snow, and let the winter winds become your music!

In the 273rd world frozen by ice and snow, Octavia once faced the chill of the long polar night unprepared. When the planet reached its farthest orbital point, the temperature dropped by another thirty percent, approaching the lowest point of particle kinetic energy. Even her coat that could withstand gunfire and molten iron could hardly endure this ordeal. Just then, a classical and elegant manor appeared before her, where two young hosts warmly graciously invited her inside and welcomed her to an elegant ball. As it turned out, this place was regarded as a milestone for the civilization's triumph over harsh environments. The severe winter was one of their greatest adversaries, but it also witnessed their complete establishment on every star in the stellar system. For this reason, people would hold elegant celebrations on the coldest snow night, and the attire of the two hosts was thus etched in Octavia's memory, becoming a precious page in her chronicles.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace"
Description:
The Noble Grace set. Defined by discreet professionalism, courteous manners, and calm confidence in any situation, this ensemble captures the effortless poise that defines an attendant's sense of style.

Among the countless figures passing through her 712th world, the Paradise Planet, Octavia found her attention drawn not only to the planet's quick-thinking — if occasionally eccentric — governor, nor to the painter whose imagination seemed boundless, but also to two travel butlers whose presence struck a rare balance between discipline and ease. In their hands, each journey was planned with clocklike precision. Every movement was measured, every moment accounted for, yet never at the cost of flexibility. When circumstances shifted, they adjusted without pause, reshaping plans as naturally as turning a page. And despite such meticulous rigor, their manner remained gentle and composed, guiding guests through each attraction in relaxed comfort, so that every experience unfolded smoothly, with not a second lost. It was this philosophy that resonated deeply with Octavia. In its honor, she devised a concept to give form to that ideal: a design she named "Noble Grace."

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Scarlet Cloudfall"
Description:
The Scarlet Cloudfall set. Fiery red hair echoes the glow of sunset clouds, while flowing cloud patterns bring motion to every detail of the outfit. Together, they strike a bold, energetic rhythm that defines the set's standout style.

Legends tell that when the violet-black shroud of misfortune lifts, the skies of the 66th world change in a heartbeat, dark clouds giving way to a brilliant dawn. In that fleeting moment, scarlet clouds and freely flowing skies come to embody hope and good fortune, their forms echoed throughout local dress and ornamentation. Wary of drawing suspicion as an outsider, Octavia embraced these symbols when designing an outfit meant to follow local custom. Thus was "Scarlet Cloudfall" born — woven with auspicious colors and cloudlike motifs, intended to blend seamlessly into the land's cultural fabric. Yet subtle differences remained, and through them, her true origins quietly surfaced. Her fears, however, never came to pass. Instead of rejection, she was met with warmth and acceptance. In remembrance of this journey and of the kindness she found in the 66th world, Octavia preserved Scarlet Cloudfall as a keepsake.

Description:
The Scarlet Cloudfall set. Fiery red hair echoes the glow of sunset clouds, while flowing cloud patterns bring motion to every detail of the outfit. Together, they strike a bold, energetic rhythm that defines the set's standout style.

Legends tell that when the violet-black shroud of misfortune lifts, the skies of the 66th world change in a heartbeat, dark clouds giving way to a brilliant dawn. In that fleeting moment, scarlet clouds and freely flowing skies come to embody hope and good fortune, their forms echoed throughout local dress and ornamentation. Wary of drawing suspicion as an outsider, Octavia embraced these symbols when designing an outfit meant to follow local custom. Thus was "Scarlet Cloudfall" born — woven with auspicious colors and cloudlike motifs, intended to blend seamlessly into the land's cultural fabric. Yet subtle differences remained, and through them, her true origins quietly surfaced. Her fears, however, never came to pass. Instead of rejection, she was met with warmth and acceptance. In remembrance of this journey and of the kindness she found in the 66th world, Octavia preserved Scarlet Cloudfall as a keepsake.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Cerulean Tidestrike"
Description:
The Cerulean Tidestrike set. Cerulean waters stretch endlessly, waves rising in boundless motion. In the hero's grasp, the blade mirrors this flow, unceasing and determined to cleanse all that is tainted.

Across the universe, chaos is never without its followers, but neither is order without its guardians. In the steel jungle of the 118th world, such guardians exist in the shadows, known as "The Tideforged Order." They drift between high-rises like passing tides, concealing themselves beneath wide-brimmed hats as they quietly erase threats that would disrupt the fragile balance of peace. An outsider whose origins were unknown and whose movements were difficult to trace, Octavia was once mistaken for one such threat. Steel met steel in their first encounter, yet from that clash came understanding. As the people of Teyvat say, true recognition often follows a crossing of blades. With the misunderstanding laid to rest, suspicion gave way to trust, and strangers became allies. Impressed by her exceptional combat skill, The Tideforged Order later invited Octavia to serve as an external instructor, entrusting her with the training of their disciples. The attire she wore in this role has since been carefully preserved, kept as a record of this rare meeting.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Grace in Motion"
Description:
The Grace in Motion set. Adorned with delicate rose motifs and designed for graceful, synchronized movement, it expresses heartfelt emotion through dance, letting the joy of celebration and treasured moments linger indefinitely.

On the 93rd planet, few events were as cherished by students as the White Night Concert, second only to enrollment and graduation ceremonies. In Octavia's memories, the excitement began two months before the performance, when academy youth devoted every spare moment to rehearsing their signature pieces — whether refined classical symphonies, lively grand productions, or daring experimental compositions. At the heart of it all stood the academy's conductor, the "maestro of motion," whose rose-adorned gown danced with the music, etching a cherished memory in Octavia's heart.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Peaceful Warm Night"
Description:
The Peaceful Warm Night set. It features soft, soothing colors and gentle, skin-friendly fabrics that wrap you in comforting warmth, making each night serene and restful.

On the 273rd planet, the long stretches of polar day and night define the rhythm of life. For first-time visitors, the challenge is twofold: enduring the extreme temperatures and adjusting to the disorienting, unrelenting light cycles. For a seasoned traveler like Octavia, however, such conditions were no obstacle. A safe, warm room and her trusty sleepwear set from the 118th planet were all she needed to drift into peaceful slumber. After all, when it comes to navigating sleep under chaotic lighting, the designers of the steel forests were unparalleled in their craft.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Sunwarmed Malt"
Description:
The Sunwarmed Malt set. The crackling warmth of the hearth and the sweet, golden scent of wheat blend like a rich, bountiful melody, radiating comfort and a sense of wholesome satisfaction.

In the 67th world, the rise of mass-produced food had filled every table, yet some still clung to the age-old art of cooking. Around glowing hearths, they prepared simple yet heartfelt dishes for those nearby. One day, a baker handed Octavia a freshly baked sample on the street, saying, "The flavor of a warm hearth is the flavor of true happiness." That golden, fragrant bread, together with the baker's attire, became a lasting memory she would keep close.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Boundless Resolve"
Description:
The Boundless Resolve set. Though born without wings, humanity has never stopped dreaming of flight. Let your heart lift and ride the wind, and the endless sky will one day become your domain.

Among the endless reaches of the universe, some worlds hum with extraordinary, mystical powers, while others remain untouched and ordinary. The 1217th planet, visited by Octavia, was one such unremarkable world, a place where humans were born without the gift of flight. However, it was precisely this invisible restraint that kindled their boundless desire to soar. Their flying machines were crude and offered scant protection, but still, they pursued the skies with unwavering resolve. As they would say, "Once you've experienced flight, your eyes will always turn skyward. Having touched its vastness, you'll carry a lasting longing for that freedom."

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Morning's Dawn and Dew"
Description:
The Morning's Dawn and Dew set. As the year begins anew and the clock nears midnight, may you rise like the morning sun, carrying vitality, optimism, and promise into the days ahead.

Even for the seasoned traveler Octavia, the 66th planet stood out as extraordinary. Perhaps a form of "convergent evolution" had shaped its civilization, for some of its customs echoed those of Liyue in Teyvat. At the turn of the year, both cultures adorned themselves with metallic coins symbolizing wealth, a gesture meant to usher in prosperity. Yet the planet's New Year was far longer than Liyue's — sometimes lasting an entire stellar year. Its length was measured by the "Nian beast's presence," and only when this presence peaked could the year be considered complete. Octavia noted that the so-called "Nian" beast resembled certain abyssal creatures. The circular coins with square holes, employed as decorations, seemed to function much like Liyue's Adepti Sigils, capable of dispelling the ominous force locals called "bad luck." Recognizing the special significance of this attire, Octavia deliberately added it to her collection of firsthand experiences.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Triumphal Golden Apple"
Description: Triumphal Golden Apple Set. Wear the emblem of the golden apple over your heart, a symbol of all that is positive. May the favor of the god of victory accompany you on your journey.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Comedy Performance"
Description:
Comedy Performance Set. In this hectic world of comings and goings, laughter is the most precious gift. Put on these gorgeous, eye-catching cosmetics, strike some funny and goofy poses, and bring smiles to everyone's faces!

The 722nd planet, the "Sanctuary of Recovery," is not only renowned for its medical expertise but also places great emphasis on the psychological care of its patients. To this end, the governor specifically invited a famous comedy duo from the 712th planet, the "Elysium Star," to brighten their lives. However, the duo's first appearance caused a degree of panic among some of the patients. After all, such sudden and unusual "Special Care" could easily lead to various speculations. But thanks to their masterful performance, they quickly redirected the patients' attention back to the stage, leaving extremely joyful memories in the "retirement life" of "Octavia"...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Divine Providence"
Description:
Divine Providence Set. It seamlessly integrates solemn tones, orderly design, and patterns laden with profound symbolism, evoking the image of a pine standing firm in the midst of a blizzard. No matter how adverse a situation may be, the wise always find a way out with composure.

On the 66th planet, a world perpetually shrouded in a purple-black haze of "Misfortune," dwells an active group known as "Auspimancers." They are far more than geomancers in any traditional sense — they are strategists who provide their clients with tactical assistance and help them navigate through crises. Renowned for their ability to steer through peril toward stability, it is widely believed that they are able to repel "Misfortune" itself by reading the hidden energies of the land. It was the leader of these auspimancers, the most observant person on the planet, who first discovered that Octavia came from interstellar space. Thanks to her mediation and guidance, Octavia was able to establish contact with the local inhabitants without any friction or conflict whatsoever.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Galaxy Wanderer"
Description:
Galaxy Wanderer Set. Deep within the infinite sky, countless secrets await revelation. Put on this set, follow the path marked by the stars, and embark on a journey through the mysterious universe.

While observing the 1217th planet, Octavia discovered that due to the lack of extraordinary powers and space technology, its inhabitants' understanding of the universe and the microscopic world was based largely on limited observational data and mathematical deductions. Nevertheless, their insights, though abstract, were nothing short of profound, and the most accomplished among their astronomers were capable of predicting cosmic anomalies through mathematical calculations. However, as an extraterrestrial observer, Octavia provided no path forward. Just as the precept, passed down through generations of sages clad in star-patterned robes, goes: "Truth itself is easy to understand; the key lies in the process of discovery."

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Galaxy Wanderer"
Description:

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Grand Slam Passion"
Description:
Grand Slam Passion Set. Comfortable and stylish sportswear, specifically designed to unleash youthful enthusiasm. Put it on and let your sweat flow freely on the field. Let the sound of your strikes resound throughout the world and bring cheers of joy to life!

During her journey across thousands of planets, Octavia discovered that no matter how advanced or primitive a civilization was, art and sports were always essential parts of it. The 93rd planet, the "Academy Planet," had invested tremendous manpower and resources to build multiple sports complexes on the scale of small cities. Every year during the hottest season of the stellar calendar, the young people on the planet form teams representing their academies to compete in intense tournaments. Among them, a legendary athlete left a deep impression on Octavia. When his team was trailing by 3 points in a desperate situation, he hit an "ultimate walk-off grand slam," clinching the game with a stunning comeback. The Grand Slam Passion Set draws its inspiration from the uniform the player wore on that day.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Grand Slam Passion"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy"
Description:
Owl Envoy Set. Undeterred by hardship or danger, the envoy braves the biting frost and bitter wind. The envoy's silhouette, resembling that of a small, agile owl, glides through the streets and alleys, weaving connections between hearts with threads of information on every silent delivery.

In her pursuit of starkly different scenery, Octavia would sometimes shift her activity to the night to circumvent the crowds. This allowed her to encounter a mysterious profession on the 1217th planet: the Owl Envoy. The owl envoys held an enigmatic occupation and used the image of a small, agile owl as their emblem. They operated only during dusk and night, traversing all kinds of rugged terrain with ease thanks to their extraordinary agility and silent movements, facing potential dangers with formidable strength. In a world without supernatural elements or advanced technology, their aura of mystery and power led Octavia to associate them with the messengers of Natlan. Furthermore, she couldn't help but wonder if they might also be a covert paramilitary force. However, Octavia didn't delve deeper into her investigation and simply recorded the distinctive attire of the owl envoys, thus avoiding any problems that might arise from prying into confidential matters.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Chromatic Mist"
Description:
Chromatic Mist Set. The colors of this set stand out in a dreamy palette, evoking the hopeful future that street artists yearn for. Although that future may be as ethereal and intangible as vapor, their pursuit remains unwavering.

Thirty years before Octavia arrived on the 118th planet, that world experienced a golden age of thriving scientific and economic development. People at that time fearlessly pursued even the most outlandish scientific visions and strove to bring their fantasies to life. Now, in the corners of the "Steel Forest," broken machines are piled like mountains, leaving only the remnants of unfulfilled dreams. However, street artists continue their pursuit of a hopeful future. The "Chromatic Mist" set is one such creative work. It is painted with the rich interplay of light and shadow cast by the broken machines, an attempt to reawaken those glorious times that lie sealed in memory.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Drip-Drop Ribbit"
Description:
Drip-Drop Ribbit Set. The joyful splashes are like dance steps, and the raindrops patter like a drum. Take a walk in the drizzle and radiate vitality and energy!

As in the history of many civilizations, the creators of the 67th planet also endured bloody wars. Thanks to their exceptional biomimetic technology, they manufactured all sorts of advanced weapons, including biomimetic raincoats shaped like frogs that allowed soldiers to move easily in torrential rain and swamps. Today, the smoke of war has long since cleared, cold steel has been forged into farming tools, and dangerous chemicals have been repurposed into life-saving medicines. The technology of those biomimetic raincoats has also been reborn, now evoking the laughter of children playing in the rain. The peaceful scenery, the laughter of children, along with the pledge to "beat swords into plowshares and spears into pruning hooks," have formed a heartwarming chapter in Octavia's memory.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Drip-Drop Ribbit"
Description:

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Cloud Edge's Glory"
Description:
Cloud Edge's Glory Set. The inhabitants of the citadel collected the light from the clouds and mist to fashion luxurious garments with which to extol the honor of the victors. They also meticulously forged imperishable metals to sculpt a golden crown in the shape of wings, as a token of homage and praise...

When Octavia's journey reached the 1896th planet, the local civilization was still in the classical era of city-states featuring the use of bronze tools. The city-states were constantly at war with each other and had long been mired in conflict. The arrival of enemies from the Abyss further exacerbated the distrust and division among the city-states. To end this chaos, they decided to hold sacred tournaments during ceremonies honoring their heroes, with the one who obtained the most crowns becoming the leader of all city-states, responsible for quelling internal strife and repelling external enemies. Upholding the tradition of respecting all the mighty warriors, Octavia, who had descended upon this world, was invited by the city-states to participate in this tournament. As a witch capable of traveling among the stars, she won every competition she entered without question. Her image, clad in the Cloud Edge's Glory Set, was immortalized in a statue that still stands in the hall of sacred tournaments, and also in Octavia's memory.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Cloud Edge's Glory: Blazing Radiance"
Description:
The refined Cloud Edge's Glory Set. The Blazing Radiance, the flame rising amidst clouds and mist, is the arbiter and witness of the sacred tournaments, the leader of challengers, and the bestower of heroic youth. The great champion, clad in a crimson robe and bearing a silver bow, becomes the embodiment of the Blazing Radiance, and with its vigilant gaze and protective might, proclaims the beginning and end of the tournament...

When Octavia's journey reached the 1896th planet, the local civilization was still in the classical era of city-states featuring the use of bronze tools. The city-states were constantly at war with each other and had long been mired in conflict. The arrival of enemies from the Abyss further exacerbated the distrust and division among the city-states. To end this chaos, they decided to hold sacred tournaments during ceremonies honoring their heroes, with the one who obtained the most crowns becoming the leader of all city-states, responsible for quelling internal strife and repelling external enemies. Upholding the tradition of respecting all the mighty warriors, Octavia, who had descended upon this world, was invited by the city-states to participate in this tournament. As a witch capable of traveling among the stars, she won every competition she entered without question. Her image, clad in the Cloud Edge's Glory Set, was immortalized in a statue that still stands in the hall of sacred tournaments, and also in Octavia's memory.

Description: The Evening Seabreeze Set is a commemorative coastal-themed set from the largest aquarium on a certain planet. Put on this set to add a little more pizzazz to your sunset stroll by the balmy sea...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Evening Seabreeze"
Description: The Evening Seabreeze Set is a commemorative marine-themed set from the largest aquarium on a certain planet. Put on this set to add a little more pizzazz to your balmy sunset stroll by the sea...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Resolute Spirit"
Description: The Resolute Spirit Set is a durable athleticwear set with a sharp, crisp silhouette which stands up to the demands of vigorous workouts and the workplace alike. Moved by the energy and spirit with which the workers of the Blackcliff Forge in Liyue undertook their morning workouts, Octavia decided to commission several of this set as a gift for the forge when the opportunity next arose.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Leisurely Wisteria"
Description: The Leisurely Wisteria Set is an outfit worn by apprentice gardeners, designed to strike a balance between elegance and freedom of movement. Its color palette also blends harmoniously with the surrounding garden scenery.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Leisurely Wisteria"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Frosty Roar"
Description: The Frosty Roar Set is a mascot suit inspired by the flying dragons of fairy tales, featuring a head design incorporating elements from creatures like kitty cats and hamsters. "Aggro-but-adorable" creatures are often popular on the peace-loving planets.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Scorching Roar"
Description: The Scorching Roar Set is a mascot suit inspired by the flying dragons of fairy tales, featuring a head design incorporating elements from creatures like kitty cats and hamsters. "Aggro-but-adorable" creatures are often popular on the peace-loving planets.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Lazurite Sword"
Description:
The Lazurite Sword Set. The formidable monster-slaying swordsmen of the "Kingdom" have always stepped onto the battlefield with an air of supreme resolve and confidence.
For some unknown reason, the 666th planet harbors a deadly evil power that has caused monsters to ravage the land unchecked, and for decades, the "Kingdom's" troops have struggled to hold the line against these monsters. However, a certain unit led by two field-grade officers has succeeded in penetrating the enemy line on several occasions. Drawing on discoveries from a long-lost civilization made by two historians, and on calculations from the visitor Octavia, the two commanders were able to pinpoint the monsters' lair — the very same monsters that had caused the downing of Octavia's ship, it turns out.
Before the big battle, the two field-grade officers left instructions for their subordinates, bequeathing their precious formal wear to Octavia as a gesture of their gratitude...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Lazurite Sword"
Description:
The Lazurite Sword Set. The formidable monster-slaying swordsmen of the "Kingdom" have always stepped onto the battlefield with an air of supreme resolve and confidence.

Before the big battle, the two field-grade officers left instructions for their subordinates, bequeathing their precious formal wear to Octavia as a gesture of their gratitude...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo"
Description:
The Timeless Echo Set. Moving back in time to trace the marks left by ancient civilizations on the world, and studying the insights they have left behind for future generations...
Octavia was attempting a gravity slingshot to escape the 666th planet's galaxy in her rental ship when hyperspeed shrapnel from the planet's surface forced her to make an emergency landing at a ruin instead. And at this very ruin were two historians who had long awaited a prophet foretold in the classics — and Octavia, they came to believe, was that prophet. They told her about the "Evil Star," a mysterious force that plagued the planet, guided her to a human stronghold for safety, and even gave her their life savings for her travel expenses...
It is for this reason that Octavia remembers the duo so vividly, an decided to create a dignified and beautiful  outfit for the two of them...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo"
Description:

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Sleek Sprint"
Description:
The Sleek Sprint Set. Stepping away from their usual free-spirited character, this mercenary sports a trendy, youthful look. Tucked away in those oversized pockets is either a can of soda or a compact firearm ready to purge evil.
Don't mistake pleasure for fragility. On the "Paradise Planet" (Planet 712) and the "Healing Planet" (Planet 722), order is upheld by an armed force dedicated to purging any troublemakers. Having spent years robbing the rich to help the poor across the planet, this band of reformed mercenaries has finally settled down, serving as the permanent guardians of these two "Utopias." Of their ranks, the two youngest and most elite marksmen often conduct "low-profile" patrols, blending into the crowd so as not to disturb the tourists. As they brushed past Octavia, she sensed the hidden secrets beneath their oversized coats and invited them for a drink and a friendly chat.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Cheerful Playmate"
Description:
The Cheerful Playmate set. Obedient and ever-loyal, a devoted doggie is always sure to be a crowd favorite.
The "Healing Planet" (Planet 722) features more than just medical facilities for physical rejuvenation, it is also home to numerous "Pet Paradises" designed to boost mental well-being. Among them, Octavia was particularly impressed by a dog-themed amusement park where the staff sported charming puppy costumes. Upon returning to her spaceship, she recreated their signature outfits from memory.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Cheerful Playmate"
Description:
The Cheerful Playmate set. Obedient and ever-loyal, a devoted doggie is always sure to be a crowd favorite.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Wicked Warlock"
Description:
The Wicked Warlock Set. A sinister figure chanting cryptic spells, ideal for playing the classic villain in any setting...
Following the completion of several Teyvat-style theme parks on the 712th planet, operators began organizing a global 'Super Tour' to bridge the journeys between the various parks. In search of a villain for the tour, Octavia's mind went straight to the Abyss Mages — creatures she had disliked since her first days in Teyvat. Back then, Octavia had mistaken a wondering Abyss Mage for a wild animal and offered it a feast, only to be met with a dual response of searing flames and biting frost.
In fact, during the scriptwriting for the tour, Octavia insisted as the aesthetic consultant that the 'Wicked Warlock' be played as textbook villains. All She wanted was to make it crystal clear: Don't ever underestimate an Abyss Mage.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Blazing Ambition"
Description:
The Blazing Ambition Set. Passion and enthusiasm are essential on the sports field. When athletes and spectators fuel one another, they create a masterpiece of competitive spirit.
On the "Academy Planet" (Planet 93), a certain ball game enjoys immense popularity. Played by two teams of five, the game centers on dribbling skills and scoring as many baskets as possible within the time limit. Traditionally, "spirit squads" perform during the intervals of each quarter to keep the energy high. While their role in setting the atmosphere is undeniable, the squad members often harbor a competitive fire of their own. Under Octavia's guidance, a young duo managed to turn their dreams into reality — transitioning from leading the cheers to leading the team, rising from the spirit squad all the way to team captains. When helping design the next generation of uniforms, they added optional spirit-style accessories, hoping their journey would inspire everyone watching from the sidelines.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Tart Berry Muse"
Description:
The Tart Berry Muse Set. While bread wards off hunger and cold, cake brings comfort and joy. A pastry chef who masters their craft while keeping prices within a friendly range can become a true treasure to their neighborhood — or even the entire city.
On the 67th planet, there lives a pair of pastry chefs known as the "Berry Obsessives," whose singular goal is to reach the pinnacle of the dessert world. Upon hearing news of an extraterrestrial visitor, they went as far as to pay an uninvited visit to Octavia, presenting her with a staggering 99-course feast of berry-themed desserts. All they craved was the ultimate endorsement: "Even an alien couldn't stop at just one bite!" It was a night of culinary madness that nearly sent her into a sugar-induced coma...
Fortunately, Octavia realized their talent extended far beyond berries — it was simply their passion that was... unorthodox. To this end, she designed this outfit for them so they could "wear their love on their sleeves," finally finding a way to guide them toward exploring new ingredients...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Scaleblade Chronicles"
Description:
The Scaleblade Chronicles Set. A suit of armor that balances agility with resilience, blending the stately silhouette of a general's uniform with the menacing, lightweight plating of a fell dragon. Whether navigating a battlefield of splattered flame and rampaging beasts, or taking a seat of honor at a triumphal ceremony, this attire ensures its wearer meets every occasion with absolute composure.
As the decisive clash erupted on the 666th planet, the kingdom's twin "Lazurite Swords" plunged into the heart of the fell dragon's territory, nearly severing its lifeline before falling to an inexhaustible swarm. Just as all hope seemed lost, their lieutenants arrived with Octavia's backing. Tearing through the last obstacle, they decapitated the fell dragon and returned the letters their commanders had penned, a sign that the day of sacrifice was over.
In the wake of their victory, the twin "Lazurite Swords" stepped down from their roles, bequeathing their legacy to their two lieutenants. As the new generals took command, they committed themselves to sweeping away the last of the foe. Elements of the fell dragon's form were dismantled and forged into ornaments for their new armor, serving as an unparalleled deterrent against the monsters that remained.
Octavia would always remember the heroic sight of the two new generals — including the silhouette of their slightly trembling hands as they signed the papers to pay her spaceship's damages in full.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Leisurely Holiday"
Description: The Leisurely Holiday set. A comfortable everyday ensemble designed to evoke a closeness to nature. Its mellow color scheme and relaxed fit, adorned with botanical motifs, exude a sense of vacation-ready ease. As the evening air turns cool, a stroll down a shaded path in this set is sure to have a charm all its own.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Gilded Skies"
Description: The Gilded Skies set. A sharp everyday set made for life in the desert. Woven with dune gold and sky blue, its vivid palette recalls the afternoon desert sky. Crafted from breathable yet durable fabric and finished with minimalist metal accents, it is built to last without sacrificing style.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Morning's Ascent"
Description: The Morning's Ascent set. Inspired by climbing blooms, this set features layers of pale violet and soft blue. Like delicate petals bathed in the morning light, it carries a quiet vitality that seems to rise gently upward through the soft glow.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Verdant Chase"
Description: The Verdant Chase set. A comfortable, close-fitting football kit. Put it on to ignite the passion in your heart as you step onto the pitch amidst waves of cheering. With your eyes locked on the goal, charge forward like a beam of sunlight toward victory!

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Verdant Chase"
Description: The Verdant Chase set. A comfortable, close-fitting football kit. Put it on to ignite the passion in your heart as you step onto the pitch amidst waves of cheering. With your eyes locked on the goal, charge forward like a beam of sunlight toward victory!

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Phantom Prowl"
Description:
The Phantom Prowl set. With its sharp, streamlined silhouette, every line of its design is made for silent movement and explosive bursts. In life-and-death combat, the wearer moves with such speed that overlapping afterimages trail in their wake, making it impossible for enemies to lock onto their true form.

After the main fighting on Planet No. 666 had come to an end and compensation for the ship had been secured, Octavia did not depart at once. Instead, she remained to assist the former lieutenants of the "Lazurite Swords" — the two great generals who had slain the evil dragon — in reorganizing the combat forces. With the beasts now leaderless and the remaining enemies scattered across every corner of the planet, the generals' chief task became the precise tracking and eradication of the evil dragon faction's remnants. To that end, those skilled in traveling light, stealth, swift combat, and reconnaissance were given a more prominent role. They became the "Shadow Unit" under the generals' direct command, and their uniforms, designed with both practicality and appearance in mind, were likewise selected by Octavia herself. To further enhance their abilities, Octavia also cast a measure of "illusion magic" on them to mislead their opponents...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Phantom Prowl"
Description:

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Sun-Veiled Stealth"
Description:
The Sun-Veiled Stealth set. Inspired by two spirits with a catlike appearance, and by their eternal companion.

The 507th planet on Octavia's journey is filled with adorable "hunters." These spirits, which resemble the cats and dogs familiar to ordinary understanding, will randomly seek out a human and form a pact with them. In return for caring for them and providing their food for life, the human gains wondrous powers — perhaps hearing of extreme sharpness, or a sense of touch precise enough to catch the tremors of plants and trees...
By tradition, the pact-making ritual takes the form of a special game of "hide-and-seek": the longer one lasts in the ritual, the stronger the pact becomes. Unluckily for Octavia, a lawsuit with the space-lane company had kept her from sleeping well, and she was eliminated in the very first round, losing her chance at a cat spirit. Even so, she was deeply impressed by the winners of that match. The boy and girl were skilled at using visual illusions, and even under bright sunlight they could be mistaken for a passing cloud shadow or a sun-baked pebble. In the end, it was the overlooked black-and-white ditzy cat spirit that tracked them down purely by instinct. Although the boy and girl came away with only a pair of cat ears, without gaining any real power, they always cherished the little cat spirit as their dearest friend, and lived out the rest of their days in peace and joy...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist"
Description:
The Splatter Artist set. The bright yellow base glows like brilliant seaside sunshine, with ink splatters scattered across it. These splashes are no mere stains — they are artistic traces sprayed by a certain adorable creature.

On the resort beaches of Planet No. 503, "Ocean World," Octavia encountered a group of little octopuses known as the "Splatter Artists." These rotund little creatures are not only champion swimmers but also natural-born artists. Whenever they happily encounter new friends, they absorb colorful natural mineral pigments and precisely spray them onto the hems of passersby's clothing. The locals pay no mind to these indelible splashes of color, seeing them instead as the little octopuses' most sincere invitation. Captivated by these distinctive, colorful outfits, Octavia was moved by the spontaneous creativity behind them and recorded and recreated the set.

On the beaches of Planet No. 503, "Ocean World," Octavia encountered a group of little octopuses known as the "Splatter Artists." These rotund little creatures are not only champion swimmers but also natural-born artists. Whenever they happily encounter new friends, they absorb colorful natural mineral pigments and precisely spray them onto the hems of passersby's clothing. The locals pay no mind to these indelible splashes of color, seeing them instead as the little octopuses' most sincere invitation. Captivated by these distinctive, colorful outfits, Octavia was moved by the spontaneous creativity behind them and recorded and recreated the set.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Letter's Afterglow"
Description:
The Letter's Afterglow set. The thick, comforting fabric recalls the texture of aged stationery. Inspired by the flap of an envelope, the collar features crisp lines, giving it a formal, dignified look.

Unlike other items preserved within the Wonderlands, this set's current appearance differs slightly from how it looked when it was first preserved. On tranquil Planet No. 921, Octavia became acquainted with two scribes who valued both literary grace and integrity. She recorded the outfits they wore at work, though these outfits were originally a subdued grey and black. Earlier, when Paimon first caught sight of the outfits, she remarked, "They look just like Sir Arthur's clothes! So elegant!"
To her surprise, the Wonderlands seemed to respond to Paimon's remark. By the time the outfit was finally obtained, it had also taken on Sir Arthur's signature deep crimson...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Ink-Tinged Sprout"
Description:
The Ink-Tinged Sprout set. Designed for life in the mountains and wilderness, this everyday outfit is imbued with the deep springtime spirit of the forest. Its ink-black exterior resembles the tough sheath of a bamboo shoot breaking through the soil, enveloping a vibrant sliver of fresh green within.

One morning on Planet No. 66, Octavia stumbled across a one-of-a-kind "Bamboo Harvest Festival." To ease the harvest in the thick bamboo groves and celebrate the arrival of a new spring, the local people sewed these fun outfits. The set's durable, inky fabric replicates the tough outer shell of aged bamboo, while the bright green lining and cuffs recall the tender green of new shoots after the first spring rain. It's said that wearing this attire lets you move nimbly through the bamboo groves, helping you unearth the freshest shoots in a flash. Touched by this simple, pure joy, Octavia recorded this light, lively color that belonged to the bamboo grove.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Ink-Tinged Sprout"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Cherry Blossom Driftwind"
Description:
The Cherry Blossom Driftwind set. Crafted from light, comfortable fabric, this set evokes the image of petals dancing in the breeze, exuding a clean, effortless spring air.

During her journey on Planet No. 311, Octavia discovered a bay filled with Sakura trees in addition to the important "Eternal Gardens." The locals here rarely go out, yet they have a custom: during the few days when the blossoms are at their peak, they hang their clothes on long lines beneath the blooming trees. They believe the breeze carries falling petals to the fabric, leaving the scent of the blossoms on it. Preserving floral fragrance on clothing in this natural way, and thus experiencing that unique charm anytime, anywhere, is one of the important ways for "Flower Whisperers" to form bonds with flowers. After learning how this custom worked from the local boy and girl with the most potential to become "Flower Whisperers," Octavia also recorded their clothing, noting it as "an opportunity to befriend flowers."

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Cherry Blossom Driftwind"
Description:
The Cherry Blossom Driftwind set. Crafted from light, comfortable fabric, this set evokes the image of petals dancing in the breeze, exuding a clean, effortless spring air.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Melody of Petals"
Description:
The Melody of Petals set. A gardener's ensemble worn in a cozy greenhouse. Crafted from comfortable fabric, its colors are as soft and muted as petals bathed in sunlight. Wearing it, one can almost catch the scent of damp earth and the fragrance of first blooms, turning every bend to trim and every pour of the watering can into a moment of lighthearted poetry.

Planet No. 311, which Octavia visited, was especially unique, for the will of the entire planet was expressed through its "flowers." Signs of a bountiful harvest, omens of impending calamity... every phenomenon yet to come would be reflected in the flowers' colors and growth. To communicate gently with the planet and grasp the changes to come, the locals built many "Eternal Gardens" around important floral regions. Within these gardens, time itself seems to stand still. The light, temperature, and humidity are forever kept in the optimal range for plants to grow. The special group known as "Flower Whisperers" became the central figures of each garden, serving as both "interpreters" who converse with the plants and "caretakers" who tend to them. Their garments are made of soft fabrics in gentle tones, conveying a sense of everyday life and quiet strength...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Melody of Petals"
Description:
The Melody of Petals set. A gardener's ensemble worn in a cozy greenhouse. Crafted from comfortable fabric, its colors are as soft and muted as petals bathed in sunlight. Wearing it, one can almost catch the scent of damp earth and the fragrance of first blooms, turning every bend to trim and every pour of the watering can into a moment of lighthearted poetry.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Butterfly Resplendence"
Description:
The Butterfly Resplendence set. Striking a perfect balance between solemn rigor and ethereal grace, this set is rendered in elegant dusky purple. With every nimble step, the wearer lands steadily upon the principles of harmony, dancing for the seamless fusion of nature and humanity.
During her stay on Planet No. 311, Octavia happened upon its grandest ceremony. Once every twenty-seven springs, the "Flower Whisperers" represent the local residents in presenting an offering to the planet's will. This time, two scholars nearly a century old stepped into the central sea of flowers in formal attire. They had devoted ninety percent of their lives to interpreting the planet's will, making major contributions to the interpretation of "flower whispers." They also succeeded in encouraging people to live in harmony with nature and, in a gentle and rational way, improving industries that might otherwise have caused severe pollution, winning a bright future for the planet...
In this final ceremony of their lives, the two scholars donned the formal attire they had loved most in their youth and danced in the sea of flowers of the planet's will. Though their movements were slow and unpolished, the sincerity and passion they revealed moved everyone present. Octavia also firmly remembered the story of the two scholars, along with their brilliantly elegant formal attire...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Butterfly Resplendence"
Description:
The Butterfly Resplendence set. Striking a perfect balance between solemn rigor and ethereal grace, this set is rendered in elegant dusky purple. With every nimble step, the wearer lands steadily upon the principles of harmony, dancing for the seamless fusion of nature and humanity.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Butterfly Resplendence: Indigo Mist"
Description:
The enhanced version of the Butterfly Resplendence set. Amidst drifting indigo like a veil of mist, it moves to the melody of flower speech, becoming one with nature's will and continuing the eternal melody of life's song.
As the two scholars danced with sincere steps, the "Flower Whisper Ceremony" reached a crucial moment. The central flower sea seemed to respond to a certain summons, as layer upon layer of faint light rose like waves. Then, amidst a mist like powdered gemstones, the figures of a young boy and girl slowly emerged. They wore formal attire of the same style as the scholars, and their faces were exactly the same as the scholars' in their youth, as if time itself had turned back... The indigo tones of their clothing revealed their identity: incarnations of the planet's will. Gently, they welcomed the two scholars and led them into the depths of the flower sea, where they slowly vanished from sight...
Only then did it become clear that the planet had witnessed the efforts of its people over the centuries. In the end, it chose the likeness of the two scholars to shape its "Emissaries" and communicate with humanity.
By the time Octavia took her leave, the story of the two scholars and the Emissaries had already become a beloved tale known to every household. The planet continued along its own course, developing in a healthy and prosperous way, and seemed poised to withstand a virulent calamity...

Description: The Wasteland Strider set. This streamlined and form-fitting outfit is tailored from ultra-durable, hard-wearing materials. With this by your side, even the toughest expeditions in the wild will feel like a walk in the park.

Description: The Sweet Recipe set. This is a truly distinctive chef's outfit that cleverly incorporates the kitchen's most striking dish into the chef's hat. It leaves every diner with a first impression as sweet as flowing honey.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dusksea Sojourner"
Description: The Dusksea Sojourner set. This outfit, crafted with dyes that capture the very hues of the twilight sea, is imbued with a deep and captivating glow. Put it on, and you will stand undaunted even before the tallest waves.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dusksea Sojourner"

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Loafing Shark"
Description: The Loafing Shark set. Modeled after a certain docile, slow-swimming shark, this costume perfectly captures its uniquely laidback vibe. It is said that on certain planets with thriving marine ecosystems, these ferocious-looking giants are massively popular among the locals as they are actually incredibly easygoing at heart.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Loafing Shark"
Description: The Loafing Shark set. Modeled after a certain docile, slow-swimming shark, this costume perfectly captures its uniquely laidback vibe. It is said that on certain planets with thriving marine ecosystems, these ferocious-looking giants are massively popular among the locals as they are actually incredibly easygoing at heart.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Propitious Breeze"
Description:
The Propitious Breeze set. This outdoor outfit, with fresh leaf-green as its primary hue, is crafted from material that feels soft and comfortable against the skin. Accented with the lucky three-leaf clover motif, it makes you feel as if the gentle breeze of good fortune is always by your side.

Not every "Flower Whisperer" on Planet No. 311 subscribes to the cultivation method known as "Eternal Gardens" — a practice designed to perpetually lock plants into their optimal growth peak. These mild-mannered renegades firmly believe that the planet's will cannot be calculated or mass-produced in a greenhouse. Instead, they hold, the lucky breeze of abundance will only ever stir spontaneously in nature's overlooked corners. To seek out this gift of nature, they have adapted their clothing into a functional outdoor style made for long journeys. The flora they now nurture are not the glamorous flowers crowded beneath a spotlight, but the low-growing grasses found everywhere and which grow in an endless cycle of life. Octavia has chosen to faithfully recreate this outfit in this design out of recognition and respect for this philosophy...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Propitious Breeze"
Description:

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure"
Description:
The Dreamy Summer Leisure set. This is a light summer formal dress that carries an air of quiet contemplation. Featuring a laidback, casual design woven seamlessly with mysterious violet hues, it beautifully captures the uniquely enchanting magic of a midsummer's night dream.

When the starlight meets the light of the moon during a midsummer's night on Planet No. 311, the "Flower Whisperers" converge upon the heart of the wild for the Firefly Banquet. This celebration in an open expanse free from any walls is one that is attended only by the swaying grass, dancing fireflies, and murmuring streams. To the Flower Whisperers, true abundance is a splendor that blossoms only to the pulse of the wild, just as a gown's hem unfurls layer by layer with every spin, or as a flower gently breathes in the moonlight. To immortalize this celebration meant only for untamed souls, Octavia has captured the twilight and morning dew, then woven them directly into the folds of the fabric. The gown's cascading violet-to-white gradient evokes the evening sky as darkness gently falls, with intricate motifs that look like ripples stirred across flowerbeds by a midnight wind. Slip it on, and you will transcend from a simple observer to the star of the ballroom. Amidst the gentle breeze and scent of florals thick in the air, you will dance with the stars and pursue an ethereal reverie born of pure liberty and imagination.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure"
Description:

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Invigorating Chill"
Description:
The Invigorating Chill set. This is a crisp, clean-cut summer casual outfit in a vibrant light blue hue that feels just like a refreshing bite of sweet shaved ice. Put it on, and it will instantly melt away the blazing heat.

When it comes to the greatest threat to a summer beach vacation, even Octavia, the witch capable of wandering the stars, would give the exact same answer as any ordinary mortal: the blistering heat. That is why the residents of "Ocean World (Planet No. 503)," who constantly suffer from a brutal heat, have made ice-cold treats their top priority. Every midsummer, they throw a wild Ice Drink Festival that brings together the universe's finest cold-dessert masters to vie for the throne of the Summer King. The champion receives the ultimate prize: a majestic crown adorned with a cool shaved-ice pudding. As a traveler wandering through these parts and a keen enjoyer of the festivities, Octavia presented the then-victor with a gift that perfectly matched a witch's signature flair: a tiny spark of cooling magic. It turned the crown into real, never-melting shaved ice that continuously absorbs the surrounding heat, bringing a deeply refreshing chill to everyone around.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Salted Lemon Fizz"
Description:
The Salted Lemon Fizz set. This is a beach vacation outfit that exudes a cool, vibrant energy. Crafted from lightweight, breathable fabric, its bright, eye-catching colors feel just like a rejuvenating gulp of ice-cold salted lemon soda. Put it on, and you can easily quench the midsummer heat before you hit the sun and surf for more fun!

To the perpetually scorching "Ocean World (Planet No. 503)," Octavia wasn't the only newcomer on the beach — she had also brought along with her a yellow, oval, and lip-puckering fruit known as the lemon. Truth be told, Octavia wasn't a fan of lemons at all, and even found them a little off-putting. But nevertheless, she begrudgingly brought some along with her for her long voyage as a means to stave off potential illnesses.
By the time she arrived on Planet No. 503 after an arduous journey across five hundred planet, Octavia had completely forgotten about the lemons in her pack. But when she tried to order a salted lemon fizz at an Ocean World eatery, she discovered that the locals had no clue what a lemon even was, since the fruit only grows in temperate climates. In that moment, her memories came rushing back. As it turned out, a frosty salted lemon fizz was the perfect cure for the scorching heat, and when the locals pleaded with her, Octavia was happy to give away all her lemons so they could plant and grow their own. But since she had no interest in playing the divine, she firmly rejected the grand title of "Lemon Queen" they tried to confer on her. Instead, she took only this cool outfit gifted by the residents as a fond memento of this extraplanetary encounter.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Sharp-Fanged Overlord"
Description:
The Sharp-Fanged Overlord set. This is an athleisure outfit that is all about burning passion. Put it on, and you become a figure of supreme authority fueled by the raw power of the fangs and talons that dominate this realm. Take this dauntless power and smash through every obstacle before you!

A long, long time ago, long before Octavia set foot on Planet No. 67, that distant planet was once home to a race of dragons. However, these behemoths never came to possess the grand intelligence and ambitions of their cousins in Teyvat, and when they finally perished in the dust of time, they left behind nothing but monumental fossils. Dwarfing any known living creature in both size and ferocity, these fossils sparked endless fascination with a primitive world of wild life and savage bloodshed, and gave rise to a whole genre of gripping, behemoth-themed art. Today, the commanding presence of those ancient overlords has been reimagined by artists as a modern style icon that continues to silently speak of their fierce, unyielding spirit.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Spiritvessel Tzitzimitl"
Description:
Spiritvessel Tzitzimitl set. On Planet No. 777, where magic is the very lifeblood of existence, only a rare few mages hold the power to seal star fragments and wield cosmic dust. This ancient art demands not only prodigious talent but also a lifetime of knowledge accumulation. The dangers that come with it are equally immense, and a single misstep can invite catastrophic backlash. Thus, mastery is a privilege held almost solely by venerable scholars with centuries dedicated to the arcane.
As Paimon flipped through the records of Planet No. 777, she couldn't help but sigh in awe. "Centuries... and those scholars can still barely hold a candle to Citlali?"
"Though honestly, since Citlalin and Itzpapa are helping Granny Itztli, those scholars will never be able to keep up with her!"
As if responding to Paimon's words, the Wonderland reacted. The two originally plain outfits began to transform, gradually taking on the distinct characteristics of Citlalin and Itzpapa from Paimon's memories...
