Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Savannah Dappled Flash"
Description:
The Savannah Dappled Flash set. This is a casual outfit that exudes the raw energy of the untamed. Its overall design is inspired by the sleek, agile felines that streak across the savannah. Radiating a sense of laidback ease and a distinctive wildness, this look instills a bold and radiant confidence in whoever slips it on.

To enjoy peaceful and natural evolution within a universe teeming with peril is nothing short of sheer luck — especially for a primitive world like Planet No. 206 that knows nothing of the vast cosmos beyond. As its first-ever visitor from outer space, Octavia could not help but worry for the planet's safety. After much deliberation, she reached out to the nearby "Academy Planet (Planet No. 93)," entrusting this neutral world to serve as the primitive realm's silent guardian and observer from afar as the planet's young civilization grew. However, to her complete surprise, before the advanced society of Planet 93 could even leave its mark on this untamed land, the raw, primal energy of Planet No. 206 had become a hit on the Academy Planet. For the planet's youths long confined to their ivory towers of endless learning, this almost "savage" aesthetic was a complete eye-opener. Soon, a massive fashion trend celebrating raw nature and untamed energy swept through certain schools. To mark this interesting historical footnote, Octavia decided to capture the trendiest look of the time...

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Savannah Dappled Flash"
Description:
The Savannah Dappled Flash set. This is a casual outfit that exudes the raw energy of the untamed. Its overall design is inspired by the sleek, agile felines that streak across the savannah. Radiating a sense of laidback ease and a distinctive wildness, this look instills a bold and radiant confidence in whoever slips it on.

To enjoy peaceful and natural evolution within a universe teeming with peril is nothing short of sheer luck — especially for a primitive world like Planet No. 206 that knows nothing of the vast cosmos beyond. As its first-ever visitor from outer space, Octavia could not help but worry for the planet's safety. After much deliberation, she reached out to the nearby "Academy Planet (Planet No. 93)," entrusting this neutral world to serve as the primitive realm's silent guardian and observer from afar as the planet's young civilization grew. However, to her complete surprise, before the advanced society of Planet 93 could even leave its mark on this untamed land, the raw, primal energy of Planet No. 206 had become a hit on the Academy Planet. For the planet's youths long confined to their ivory towers of endless learning, this almost "savage" aesthetic was a complete eye-opener. Soon, a massive fashion trend celebrating raw nature and untamed energy swept through certain schools. To mark this interesting historical footnote, Octavia decided to capture the trendiest look of the time...

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Chromatic Fatebound Sea"
Description:
The Chromatic Fatebound Sea set. This is a summer coastal combat suit that embodies sheer exuberance, unbridled joy, and boundless vitality in a single look. The blazing midsummer sun brings the perfect opportunity to sweep away all exhaustion and vexation. Now is the time to gear up with full sun protection, grab your water gun, and wage an all-out "war" on your worries across this dazzling shore!

Inspired by the style of the "Splatter Artist," the residents of "Ocean World" (Planet No. 503) have adopted a unique "war ritual" to reshape their connections to themselves and the community. This is why the beaches are always teeming with young people in stylized combat gear tearing through the ocean waves and pouring their untamed energy into the sweltering heat. Yet, the ones who left the deepest impression on Octavia were a seemingly ordinary young boy and girl. They had no outstanding physical prowess, and nor did they carry any advanced gear. In fact, to someone with outstanding combat abilities like Octavia, their slow movements looked exactly like drops of ink gradually swirling and dissolving in water. However, the brilliant life force bursting from these slowly unfurling "colors" was utterly arresting, filling her with a genuine delight that made it impossible to look away. Perhaps this was what youth has always been meant to look like, or perhaps, this was the real purpose the war ritual was created for in the first place. Moved by this, Octavia specially crafted this outfit for the pair, in the hope that it would allow them to hold on to this vibrant spirit and youthful energy for a long time to come.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Dress"
Description: An elegant and exquisite dress, featuring a graceful skirt hem paired with a refined satin neckerchief, presenting an overall dignified and orderly style. A butler's charm lies in their meticulous professional demeanor, and proper attire only enhances this allure.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Leather Shoes"
Description: Blending elegance with functional design, these leather shoes support steady steps and composed responses in every situation a butler may face.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Long Hair"
Description: A light-toned long hairstyle framed by vertically curled side braids, subtly refining the face's proportions. Formal and dignified in appearance, this style carries the composed presence of a travel butler always composed and ready for service.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Headband"
Description: A white headband adorned with a purple bow, designed as part of a butler's uniform. Its clean lines express order and professionalism, while the bow's refined color adds a note of confident composure.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Gloves"
Description: Woven from soft yet resilient silk, these immaculate full-finger gloves fit closely to the hands, offering dependable protection. Even in demanding work environments, they preserve the composed grace expected of a proper attendant.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Stockings"
Description: White stockings. The subtle structure they create lends the wearer a sense of depth and poise, allowing each step to appear upright, composed, and quietly elegant.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Key"
Description: An elegant master key fashioned from precious metals and gemstones, meant to be worn at the waist. For a travel butler, preparedness is second nature — this key serves as a trusted tool when plans must adapt. More than that, it stands as a quiet reminder: to anticipate every possibility and remain ready for whatever lies ahead.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Formals"
Description: An elegant, finely crafted outfit featuring a swallowtail-style hem and a restrained satin tie, creating a look that is dignified and orderly. A butler's charm lies in a disciplined sense of duty, and proper attire serves to heighten that presence.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Pants"
Description: Tailored from black fabric threaded with fine white pinstripes, these pants feature a sharp, classic cut. When worn with a fitted top, they refine the silhouette, lending the wearer a look that is tall, composed, and efficiently poised.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Leather Shoes"
Description: Blending elegance with functional design, these leather shoes support steady steps and composed responses in every situation a butler may face.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Long Hair"
Description: A light-colored long hairstyle with a clean, sharp cut, accented by slightly longer strands at the front to subtly refine the face's proportions. Formal and dignified in appearance, this style carries the composed presence of a travel butler always composed and ready for service.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Monocle"
Description: A golden-framed monocle shaped by refined vintage design. Its quiet elegance brings a touch of maturity, lending weight and clarity to the wearer's professional bearing and sense of order.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Gloves"
Description: Woven from soft yet resilient silk, these immaculate full-finger gloves fit closely to the hands, offering dependable protection. In any work environment, they preserve the composed grace expected of a proper attendant.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Noble Grace Timepiece"
Description: An exquisite timepiece crafted from precious metals and gemstones that can be worn at the waist, offering exceptional timekeeping precision. One of the professional qualities of a travel butler is to be as precise as the markings on a clock, providing reliable and attentive service to their employer. Thus, for a butler, the clock is not merely a tool, but a symbol of constant self-discipline.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy Coat"
Description: A thick, windproof coat with excellent thermal insulation that allows the wearer to face changing weather conditions with greater ease. The eye-catching decorations on the cuffs and collar ensure that the silhouette of the Owl Envoy can be recognized even from afar.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy Shorts"
Description: Dark brown shorts made from wear-resistant and dirt-repellent fabric. Lightweight yet durable, their excellent quality allows the Owl Envoy to handle the busy tasks through streets and alleys with complete ease.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy Long Boots"
Description: Long brown leather boots with a reliable fastening design that keeps the shaft firmly secured around the wearer's calves, effectively alleviating fatigue and soreness from long-distance walking.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy Long Hair"
Description: Long, light brown hair with slightly upturned ends. It resembles the sharp feathers of an owl, evoking a sense of nimble and agile power.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy Soft Hat"
Description: A soft owl-shaped hat adorned with a sun-shading brim and feathers, both agile and elegant. Wearing it makes you feel as if you've transformed into a nimble little owl, able to easily soar over every corner of the city and countryside.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy Gloves"
Description: Full-finger leather gloves that enhance operational dexterity while providing all-around protection, preventing the wearer from getting cut when handling envelopes with sharp edges.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Owl Envoy Stockings"
Description: White stockings woven from thick, soft wool. They have excellent cushioning and effectively protect the feet of the Owl Envoy, who must travel long distances.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Formal Dress"
Description: An elegant and dignified set of formal wear. With its hem embroidered with symbols once used by an ancient civilization to track time, wearing this dress is like wearing the passage of history itself.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Mid-Calf Boots"
Description: Mid-calf boots adorned with subtle gold patterns. With their dust- and stain-resistant design, they are excellent gear for historians who explore ruins on the regular.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Short Hair"
Description: A smart and short hairstyle in light blue. This polished and tasteful look is also easy to style. It strikes the perfect balance between the sophistication needed in academic settings and the no-nonsense attitude essential for ruins excavation.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Cap"
Description: A soft brimless cap adorned with star-shaped decorations. This is an elegant, and understated, addition to any look.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Wristguards"
Description: Exquisite and lightweight wristguards that effectively protect the wearer's wrists and reduce fatigue from heavy paperwork.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Long Socks"
Description: Understated socks adorned with a simple but elegant pattern. Wear these to accentuate the dignified charm of your outfit.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Formal Wear"
Description: An elegant and dignified set of formal wear. With its hem embroidered with symbols once used by an ancient civilization to track time, wearing this is like wearing the passage of history itself.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Shorts"
Description: Striped shorts with a special waist-cinching design. When paired with a set of dignified formal wear, these shorts lend the wearer a shrewd, capable air.

Description: Ankle boots with a fold-over cuff, adorned with a subtle gold pattern. With their dust- and stain-resistant design, they are excellent gear for historians who explore ruins on the regular.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Gloves"
Description: Exquisite dust-proof gloves made from specially treated fabric that prevents the wearer from leaving dust or sweat behind when handling precious ancient artifacts and documents. This ensures that the original condition of every detail and every page is preserved.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Timeless Echo Long Socks"
Description: Understated socks adorned with a simple but elegant pattern. Wear these to accentuate the dignified charm of your outfit.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist Top"
Description: A lightweight top set against a vivid yellow base and scattered with colorful ink splatters. It is a natural fit for the seaside in full sun.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist Shorts"
Description: Relaxed-fit casual shorts made from soft, skin-friendly fabric. Their clean silhouette keeps them easy to wear for everyday activity while giving them a simple, polished look.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist Casual Shoes"
Description: A pair of lightweight, flat-soled casual shoes designed for effortless movement. Fitted with slip-resistant soles, they help the wearer stay steady even on slick ground.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist Short Hair"
Description: A clean-cut bob with smooth, orderly strands. Even strong gusts are unlikely to throw it out of place, making it especially easy to maintain.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist Beret"
Description: A rounded octopus-inspired hat with lively tentacle ornaments at the crown. Its bright yellow brim adds a cheerful touch while helping shield the wearer from both sun and wind.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist Leg Warmers"
Description: A pair of loose leg warmers with a soft feel and an effortlessly gathered shape. Comfortable at the ankles, they bring a layered charm to the outfit.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Splatter Artist Ornament"
Description: A camera accessory in bright, lively colors, often worn at the waist for easy access whenever something worth preserving appears.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Formals"
Description: An exquisite formal dress in a soft purple reminiscent of dusk. Indulge the free spirit in you with this combination of a golden three-leaf clover embellishment, an elegant purple flower bow tie, and a subtle floral pattern with golden trim that evokes the serene atmosphere of a midsummer's night.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Footwear"
Description: A pair of dark purple footwear with bow embellishments, simple but elegant nevertheless. It feels like every step you take in these will leave a gentle mark on the moonlit lawn.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Long Hair"
Description: A dreamy long hairstyle mainly in serene white. This is a look that speaks of casual elegance, as if the cool moonlight of a midsummer's night and the shimmering glow of fireflies have been woven into the wearer's hair.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Headband"
Description: A beautiful and elegant headband. Put on the faint glow of fireflies and the serenity of dusk in your hair with this headband, and you will be ready to step into a magnificent evening feast full of starlight and the scent of flowers thick in the air.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Wrist Accessory"
Description: A pleated wrist accessory in clean, pure white that is attached to the wearer using a dark-colored band. Its simple, minimalist design matches perfectly with the overall outfit and adds a touch of refinement to one's look.

Name: Manekina Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Stockings"
Description: White stockings with a subtle geometric pattern. They seem to weave the starlight of a midsummer night right around your ankles, offering a look of effortless lightness and elegance.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Formals"
Description: An exquisite formal dress that cleverly marries the purples of dusk with the warm grays of dawn. Indulge the free spirit in you with this combination of a golden three-leaf clover embellishment, a warm, firefly-orange bow tie, and a subtle geometric pattern with golden trim that evokes the serene atmosphere of a midsummer's night.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Long Pants"
Description: A pair of long pants in serene grays and purples with a simple, clean silhouette. The subtle geometric motifs playing along the hems catch the eye like cascading starlight across a midsummer sky.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Footwear"
Description: A pair of footwear with golden trim, simple but elegant nevertheless. It feels like every step you take in these will leave a gentle mark on the moonlit lawn.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Short Hair"
Description: A dreamy short hairstyle mainly in serene white. This is a look that speaks of casual elegance, as if the cool moonlight of a midsummer's night and the shimmering glow of fireflies have been woven into the wearer's hair.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Top Hat"
Description: A band adorned with a three-leaf clover pattern circles the brim. It exudes a simple elegance that perfectly matches the tenor of the overall outfit.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Wristwatch"
Description: A wristwatch with a simple design, low-key but nevertheless exquisite. A fine gold pattern is etched into the dial, matching the style of the overall outfit.

Name: Manekin Cosmetic - "Dreamy Summer Leisure Socks"
Description: Light-colored socks matching the overall color palette of the outfit. These give off a lively vibe despite their simple design, like petals gently trembling in the midsummer's night breeze.
